channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The best apps to find new books
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. Subscribe here. Books offer a compelling, slower alternative to the onslaught of negative news.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: The new Scuf Valor Pro controller looks like a massive upgrade for Xbox owners, but there's one big catch
item.description: The Scuf Valor Pro seems like a surprisingly affordable Xbox pro controller bursting with top-notch features.
item.dc:creator: dash.wood@futurenet.com (Dashiell Wood), TechRadar

item.title: The new Sigma BF is a boldly minimalist full-frame camera that looks as beautiful as it does impractical – I wish it had this one feature
item.description: Sigma unveils the BF, a radically different minimalist full-frame mirrorless camera with 24MP sensor and 6K video.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Líderes de TI, ejecuten estas tres acciones en 2025, según PwC
item.description: “Es un gran momento para ser un CIO con talento”, afirma Dallas Dolen, director de la práctica de Tecnología de PwC.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Like the Crucial T705 but more affordable? Micron 4600 PCIe Gen5 SSD comes painfully close to its award-winning sibling
item.description: The Micron 4600 PCIe Gen5 NVMe SSD caters to a range of users, from professionals to gamers and content creators.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mom of Starliner astronaut says daughter 'honored' to be on ISS
item.description: Williams was one of two people testing the Starliner capsule, which was not deemed safe for crewed return.
item.dc:creator: Steph Whiteside, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft releases a new genAI model that can control robots
item.description: Microsoft has launched Magma, a new generative AI (genAI) model that can be used to control everything from software to robots. The company says Magma is the first such model that can act on its own based on multimodal data such as texts, images, and video.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How Birmingham’s $48M Oracle ERP project turned into an epic failure
item.description: Birmingham City Council’s (BCC) troubled enterprise resource planning (ERP) system, built on Oracle software, has become a case study of how large-scale IT projects can go awry.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump’s tariffs on China could risk access to rare earth elements widely used in tech sector
item.description: Lithium and other elements that the U.S. needs for vital defense, energy, and other applications could become harder to obtain if the Trump administration goes ahead with tariffs and other protectionist policies aimed at China.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Zoom, Google step up their AI game with new videoconferencing features
item.description: Google and Zoom this week announced new AI features in their videoconferencing apps that the companies said are aimed at improving employee productivity. The updates focus on automating tasks during and after a videoconference.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: UK Tech Horizons Report 2025: Emerging Technologies Create Data Protection Gaps
item.description: The UK Information Commissioner's Office's (ICO) latest Tech Horizons report examines the potential data protection challenges posed by emerging technologies in connected transport, quantum sensing, healthcare diagnostics, and synthetic AI-driven content.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Charred EV batteries from California wildfires spark concern about toxic waste contaminating drinking water
item.description: A water agency in charge of ground water for 2 million L.A. County residents has several concerns about hazardous waste processing from the Eaton fire.
item.dc:creator: Steve Scauzillo, The Mercury News

item.title: Everything we know about Apple’s C1 5G modem in iPhone 16e
item.description: There’s a lot to like about Apple’s newest $599 iPhone 16e, but one of the more interesting features in the device is the Apple-designed 5G modem. Apple has spent at least seven years developing the chip, but gave it just a few short seconds of time when it announced the smartphone this week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fortinet speeds threat detection with improved FortiAnalyzer
item.description: Fortinet has reinforced its FortiAnalyzer security analytics and log management platform with capabilities that enhance enterprise threat detection and automate incident response. FortiAnalyzer securely collects logs from Fortinet devices such as FortiGate firewalls and endpoint security agents.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Apple unveils a souped-up and more expensive version of its lowest priced iPhone
item.description: Apple has released a sleeker and more expensive version of its lowest priced iPhone in an attempt to widen the audience for a bundle of artificial intelligence technology that the company has been hoping will revive demand for its most profitable product lineup.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How drones may be a big help to first responders in the future
item.description: A recent challenge sponsored by NIST tasked drone designers with creating a system to help first responders map indoor environments. The post How drones may be a big help to first responders in the future first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: 7 time-saving Linux commands
item.description: Some Linux commands can make your time on the command line easier and more productive. This post covers some commands that can come in very handy. 1.
item.dc:creator: Network World
